title:
AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF BULIKULLOL ELEMENTARY SCHOOL IN THE MUNICIPALITY
OF SIASI, PROVINCE OF SULU, TO PANGLIMA IKBALA ELEMENTARY SCHOOL.

chunks.text:
H. No. 1361 / 67 OG No. 37, 7238 (September 13, 1971)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 6208, June 19, 1971 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF BULIKULLOL ELEMENTARY SCHOOL IN THE MUNICIPALITY

OF SIASI, PROVINCE OF SULU, TO PANGLIMA IKBALA ELEMENTARY SCHOOL.

Be it enacted by the Senate -and House of Representatives of the Philippines

in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The name of Bulikullol Elementary School in the Municipality of Siasi, Province of Sulu, is changed to Panglima Ikbala Elementary School.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 19, 1971.
